subsection.title: Prisma Client Singleton
subsection.description: Connection pooling via global singleton pattern

notes.note: Global singleton prevents connection pool exhaustion in dev hot-reload
Query logging enabled by default in non-production

subsection.title: Dual Authentication Strategy
subsection.description: Application uses two separate authentication mechanisms for different use cases

auth-type.name: NextAuth.js
auth-type.storage: Server-side session with JWT stored as cookie

auth-type.name: PASETO
auth-type.storage: Token in Authorization header or cookie
auth-type.use-case: API routes, mobile apps, SPA backends

subsection.title: NextAuth Configuration
PASETO Token Service
subsection.description: PASETO v4 with Ed25519 asymmetric keys for maximum security

subsection.title: Token Blacklist

notes.note: MVP: In-memory Set resets on server restart
Production: Use Redis with TTL matching token expiry

subsection.title: Authentication Guards
subsection.description: Reusable middleware functions for route protection

subsection.title: Password Hashing
Google OAuth 2.0
subsection.description: PKCE-enhanced OAuth flow for secure authentication

pattern.name: Admin Route Protection
Session-Based Auth
Zod Validation
Role-Based Access Control

route.description: Get booking by ID with access control
Cancel booking (soft delete by status change)
Approve/reject reviews and update bordell ratings

section.title: Client API Layer

subsection.title: Auth Store
Admin Store
subsection.code:
// src/stores/adminStore.ts interface AdminState { activeTab: string stats: any | null isLoading: boolean searchQuery: string setActiveTab: (tab: string) => void setStats: (stats: any) => void setLoading: (loading: boolean) => void setSearchQuery: (query: string) => void }
export const useAdminStore = create<AdminState>((set) => ({ activeTab: 'dashboard', stats: null, isLoading: false, searchQuery: '', setActiveTab: (activeTab) => set({ activeTab }), setStats: (stats) => set({ stats }), setLoading: (isLoading) => set({ isLoading }), setSearchQuery: (searchQuery) => set({ searchQuery }) }))

section.title: Middleware
section.description: Route protection with role-based access control

section.title: Seed Data

subsection.title: Standard Try-Catch Pattern
Test Example

file.description: Database schema with all models and enums
